productDisplayName: Vishudh Women Floral Print Orange Kurta
description: "Inactivated on 11th Apr,2012, mail by Vishwanath Gopalkrishnan because of  "As a part of the annual stock correction we need to send 1890 pcs from vishudh back to the brand" Composition White kurta with orange floral print, made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck with orange and green tape detailing along the neckline and tapering at the chest, short sleeves, and orange and green tape detailing along the cuffs and vents of the hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Inspired by floral print and crafted in classic cuts, this kurta from vishudh makes for a fab addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The orange and green tape detailing adds zing to this kurta. Team it with jeans, leggings or loose pyjamas and heeled slippers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
